source.title: PDD Holdings Quarterly Earnings Releases (Q4 2024, Q1-Q3 2025) + SEC EDGAR XBRL FY2024

extractions.claim: PDD FY2024 total revenue was RMB 393.8B, up 59% YoY, with online marketing services at RMB 197.9B (+29%) and transaction services at RMB 195.9B (+108%)
extractions.evidence: FY2024: Total revenues RMB 393,836.1M. Online marketing services: RMB 197,934.2M (+29% YoY from RMB 153,540.6M). Transaction services: RMB 195,901.9M (+108% YoY from RMB 94,098.7M). Revenue mix shifted from 62%/38% (OMS/TS) in FY2023 to 50%/50% in FY2024.

verification.verifier_notes: Cross-verified: XBRL total revenue RMB 393,836,097,000 matches press release RMB 393,836.1M. FY2023 XBRL: RMB 247,639,205,000 matches.

extractions.claim: Q4 2024 revenue was RMB 110.6B with OMS at RMB 57.0B (+17%) and TS at RMB 53.6B (+33%)
extractions.evidence: Q4 2024: Total revenues RMB 110,610.1M (+24% YoY). Online marketing services: RMB 57,011.1M (+17%). Transaction services: RMB 53,599.0M (+33%). Operating profit: RMB 25,592.2M (+14%). Net income: RMB 27,446.6M (+18%).

verification.verifier_notes: From official PDD Holdings Q4 2024 earnings release on investor.pddholdings.com

extractions.claim: Q1 2025 revenue was RMB 95.7B with OMS at RMB 48.7B (+15%) and TS at RMB 47.0B (+6%)
extractions.evidence: Q1 2025: Total revenues RMB 95,672.2M (+10% YoY). Online marketing services: RMB 48,722.2M (+15%). Transaction services: RMB 46,950.0M (+6%). Operating profit: RMB 16,085.6M (-38% YoY). Net income: RMB 14,741.8M (-47% YoY).

verification.verifier_notes: From official PDD Holdings Q1 2025 earnings release

extractions.claim: Q2 2025 revenue was RMB 104.0B with OMS at RMB 55.7B (+13%) and TS at RMB 48.3B (~flat YoY)
extractions.evidence: Q2 2025: Total revenues RMB 103,984.8M (+7% YoY). Online marketing services: RMB 55,703.2M (+13%). Transaction services: RMB 48,281.6M (~flat). Operating profit: RMB 25,792.9M (-21%). Net income: RMB 30,753.5M (-4%).

verification.verifier_notes: From official PDD Holdings Q2 2025 earnings release

extractions.claim: Q3 2025 revenue was RMB 108.3B with OMS at RMB 53.3B (+8%) and TS at RMB 54.9B (+10%)
extractions.evidence: Q3 2025: Total revenues RMB 108,276.5M (+9% YoY). Online marketing services: RMB 53,347.6M (+8% from RMB 49,351.0M). Transaction services: RMB 54,928.9M (+10% from RMB 50,003.4M). Operating profit: RMB 25,025.9M (+3%). Net income: RMB 29,328.2M (+17%).

verification.verifier_notes: From official PDD Holdings Q3 2025 earnings release

extractions.claim: Revenue growth decelerated sharply from 59% (FY2024) to 10%/7%/9% in Q1/Q2/Q3 2025
extractions.evidence: YoY revenue growth trajectory: FY2023 +90%, FY2024 +59%, Q1 2025 +10%, Q2 2025 +7%, Q3 2025 +9%. Transaction services growth decelerated from +108% (FY2024) to +6%/flat/+10% in Q1-Q3 2025. Online marketing services decelerated from +29% to +15%/+13%/+8%.
